overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player emerges from a narrow alley onto a covered pedestrian walkway lined with neon advertisements, passing pedestrians and overlooking a busy street with elevated highways in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between commercial buildings

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into the covered pedestrian walkway with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk next to a building with an RC logo, approaching the main street

entered.detail: concrete building wall with illuminated RC logo signage in yellow and red
large elevated highway interchange with multiple levels visible in the distance
low concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the street level below

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow concrete alley between buildings, walking alongside a wall with an illuminated RC logo. The camera moves forward toward an elevated highway structure visible in the distance, with sparse traffic visible on the right side beyond a concrete barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising displays

events.description: entering the covered walkway with yellow tactile paving and neon advertisement displays
passing through a crowd of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered pedestrian walkway, passing by various pedestrians and observing the neon-lit storefront displays on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink and black outfit with sunglasses walking toward the camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the digital advertisement displays

entered.detail: metal framework and glass panels forming a covered roof over the pedestrian walkway
series of large digital billboards showing animated advertisements with neon yellow borders
yellow textured strips embedded in the concrete sidewalk for visually impaired guidance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with glowing digital billboards on the right. The ground features yellow tactile paving strips, and moderate crowds of pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The overhead structure creates a semi-enclosed environment while traffic moves along the street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with continuous digital billboard displays

events.description: crowd density decreases significantly as the walkway continues
passing under a darker section of the overhead structure with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway at a steady pace, observing the changing digital advertisements and city traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and dark pants walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to a building entrance, partially visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues with fewer pedestrians present. The camera moves past various digital billboards displaying animated advertisements. A concrete staircase becomes visible on the left side, gradually approaching as the segment progresses. The environment maintains the covered walkway structure with moderate traffic visible on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching building entrance with stairs

events.description: concrete stairs become prominent on the left, indicating a building entrance zone
increased traffic flow visible on the right with multiple vehicles passing by

agents.ego_description: walking past the concrete stairs on the left while continuing along the busy street walkway, observing the traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance along the same path

entered.detail: concrete barrier with illuminated red warning signs separating the walkway from the busy street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the walkway approaching a building entrance with prominent concrete stairs on the left. The neon advertisements have passed out of view, replaced by a traffic barrier with illuminated warning signs on the right. Vehicles move steadily along the adjacent street as the camera continues walking forward through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a secluded concrete alleyway into a vibrant, neon-lit pedestrian corridor of a futuristic city. It begins by walking alongside a wall featuring an illuminated RC logo, moving toward the distant silhouette of an elevated highway. As the camera emerges from the alley, the environment opens into a covered walkway characterized by yellow tactile paving and glowing digital billboards, while crowds of pedestrians flow in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the crowds thin and the camera passes a series of animated advertisements, gradually approaching a concrete staircase on the left. Finally, the neon displays fade from view, replaced by illuminated traffic warning signs and a steady stream of vehicles on the adjacent street as the camera reaches the building entrance.
